attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.RELATIONSHIP_ID, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.SOURCE_LEDGER_ID, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.TARGET_LEDGER_ID, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.SLA_LEDGER_ID, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.PRIMARY_LEDGER_ID, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.TARGET_CURRENCY_CODE, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.TARGET_LEDGER_NAME, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.TARGET_LEDGER_SHORT_NAME, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.TARGET_LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.RELATIONSHIP_TYPE_CODE, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.RELATIONSHIP_ENABLED_FLAG, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.INHERIT_CREATION_USER_FLAG, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.CREATION_DATE, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.CREATED_BY, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.GL_JE_CONVERSION_SET_ID, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.SL_COA_MAPPING_ID, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.AUTOMATIC_POST_FLAG, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.ALC_DEFAULT_CONV_RATE_TYPE, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.ALC_NO_RATE_ACTION_CODE, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.ALC_MAX_DAYS_ROLL_RATE, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.ALC_INHERIT_CONVERSION_TYPE, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.ALC_INIT_CONV_OPTION_CODE, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.ALC_INIT_PERIOD, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.ALC_INIT_DATE, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.ALC_INITIALIZING_RATE_DATE, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.ALC_INITIALIZING_RATE_TYPE, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.ALC_PERIOD_AVERAGE_RATE_TYPE, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.ALC_PERIOD_END_RATE_TYPE, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.APPLICATION_ID, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.ORG_ID, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.DISABLE_CONVERSION_DATE, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.STATUS_CODE, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.GES_UPDATE_DATE, MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.GLOBAL_NAME 
FROM
 MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS
WHERE 
MF_GL_LEDGER_RELSHNSHIPS.GES_UPDATE_DATE
>TO_DATE('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
